description: The Loielo 'ndrina is a Mafia clan from Ariola, a hamlet of Gerocarne, in the province of Vibo Valentia, Calabria, Italy. It is part of the 'Ndrangheta and has been involved in extortion and drug trafficking. The clan rose to power in the 1970s and dominated the Preserre vibonesi area for over twenty years, engaging in a decade-long feud with the Maiolo family in the 1990s. Its leadership was decimated by arrests and internal conflicts, and by the 2010s it was largely dismantled by law enforcement operations.
